records.ety: [Sp. cargo, carga, burden, load, from cargar to load, from cargar to load, charge, See Charge.]

defs: The lading or freight of a ship or other vessel; the goods, merchandise, or whatever is conveyed in a vessel or boat; load; freight.
notes: ☞ The term cargo, in law, is usually applied to goods only, and not to live animals or persons.
